theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 73점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 64 / 중기 74 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 6.2% → 2-ATR 손절폭 12.5%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +8.0% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $37.99 아래 손절가 $34.13 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Rise on Firming US-Iran Sentiment: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian equities were poised to advance after gains in US stocks and Treasuries, as reports suggested Washington and Tehran were nearing an agreement to extend a ceasefire.

top_news.title: Oil Edges Lower at Open on Tentative Deal to Extend Iran Truce
top_news.summary: Oil edged lower after the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend their ceasefire by 60 days, potentially allowing traffic to restart through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Worthington Steel Raises $1.4 Billion for Klöeckner Takeover
top_news.summary: Worthington Steel Inc. raised $1.4 billion in the leveraged-finance market Thursday to help fund its acquisition of German metals company Klöeckner & Co SE.

top_news.title: Drugmaker Apotex Files for Canada IPO Showing Revenue Jump
top_news.summary: Canadian generic drugmaker Apotex Health Corp. filed for an initial public offering in Toronto, it said in a statement on Thursday.

top_news.title: Five Charts That Show Rising Yields Reshaping Japanese Markets
top_news.summary: Japan’s financial markets have entered a new phase in which rising bond yields no longer signal just the healthy normalization of monetary policy, but also the risk that inflation may increase too much.

top_news.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $73,000 Despite Trump’s Crypto Capital Push
top_news.summary: Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 despite a fresh push from Donald Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets.

top_news.title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Trump Jr.-Backed Drone Stock Soars 57% on US Funding Hopes
top_news.summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.

top_news.title: Dollar Falls Against Major Peers on Report of US-Iran Deal
top_news.summary: The dollar fell against all of its major peers after a report that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a ceasefire, pending the approval of President Donald Trump.

top_news.title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
top_news.summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.
